title: Spex Machina Bead Map
description: Schema for .bead-map.json. Links spec node IDs to bead IDs with structured metadata.

next_id.description: Next auto-increment ID for new records.

records.description: Mapping records linking spec nodes to beads.

id.description: Unique record ID, auto-assigned by MappingStore.

spec_node_id.description: Spec node identifier in format module_name/node_type/node_id.

bead_id.description: Bead ID from the issue tracker.

module.description: Module name containing the spec node.

component.description: Component or section name within the module.

content_file.description: Relative path to the spec content markdown file.

spec_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the spec content at time of mapping.

bead_status.description: Bead status populated at runtime by preflight/apply operations.
